title: Special Demand Content
description: Per-map content file listing every special demand point with its type, name, and relationships. Point IDs map to demand_data.json entries. This schema is immutable and owned by the Subway-Builder-Modded org. Validated against the type definitions in the accompanying types file.

version.description: Schema version. Must match the types file version.

map_code.description: The map/bundle identifier this content belongs to (e.g. 'FUK', 'UKY').

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this file was generated.

points.description: All special demand points in this map.

LocalizedString.description: A dictionary of locale-keyed display strings. '__default__' is the unlocalized fallback; additional keys are BCP 47 locale tags.

SpecialDemandPoint.description: A single special demand point with its type classification, display name, and optional relationships.

point_id.description: Demand point ID as it appears in demand_data.json. Used to join content metadata with the spatial/demand data.

type.description: References a DemandType.id from the types file.

sub_type.description: Optional. References a DemandSubType.id within the parent type. Provides finer classification and may override the parent icon.

name.description: Display name for this point in the UI.

pop_ids.description: Population group IDs assigned to this demand point in demand_data.json. Each pop represents a group of commuters travelling to this point. Required for linking content metadata to the demand simulation.

sibling_point_ids.description: Optional. Other point_ids representing the same real-world entity (e.g. multiple terminals of one airport, or campus buildings of one university). The mod can group these for display.

metadata.description: Freeform key-value pairs. Common keys: 'source_url', 'website', 'source_dataset', 'capacity', 'beds', etc.
